subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I commune with Thee from the depths of my heart and the essence of my spirit, at dawn and eventide, and I lay my face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اناجیک بصمیم قلبی و هویه روحی بکورا و اصیلا و اضع وجهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
